channel.title: Course on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Course on Nature Works

item.title: Classes
item.description:
New classes section in place and a renamed store

Ain’t no denying it, we are truly in a Nature and Climate Emergency. http://localhost:1313/blog/230501-classes/

item.title: Pt.6 Canopy Tree Layer
item.description:
Part 6 of my online course preview has been livestreamed and is now available on my YouTube channel 🙂

On Wednesdays at 10am BST, I livestream a free preview of my online forest garden course. http://localhost:1313/blog/course-livestream-06-canopy/

item.title: Pt.5 Perennial Vegetables
item.description:
Part 5 of my online course preview has been livestreamed and is now available on my YouTube channel 🙂

On Wednesdays at 10am BST, I livestream a free preview of my online forest garden course. http://localhost:1313/blog/course-livestream-05-veg/

item.title: Pt.4 Protect a Backyard Forest
item.description:
Part 4 of my online course preview has been livestreamed and is now available on my YouTube channel 🙂

On Wednesdays at 10am BST, I livestream a free preview of my online forest garden course. http://localhost:1313/blog/course-livestream-04-protection/

item.title: Pt.3 Design a Backyard Forest
item.description:
Part 3 of my online course preview has been livestreamed and is now available on my YouTube channel 🙂

Every week on a Wednesday at 10am, I am a livestreaming a free preview of my online forest garden course, as part of my regular Lockdown Livestream. http://localhost:1313/blog/course-livestream-03-design/

item.title: Pt.2 Plan a Backyard Forest
item.description:
Part 2 of my online course preview has been livestreamed and is now available on my YouTube channel

Every week on a Wednesday at 10am, I am a livestreaming a free preview of my online forest garden course, as part of my regular Lockdown Livestream. http://localhost:1313/blog/course-livestream-02-plan/

item.title: Pt.1 Introducing the Backyard Forest
item.description:
Part 1 of my online course preview has been livestreamed and is now available on my YouTube channel

Every week for 8 weeks, I’m live presenting a new section of my re-vamped online course, for free, on my regular Lockdown Livestream. http://localhost:1313/blog/course-livestream-01-intro/

item.title: Forest Garden Course, livestreamed free over 8 weeks from Wed 10th June
item.description:
I’m previewing my online forest garden free, as part of my regular Wednesday Lockdown Livestream

1. Introducing the Backyard Forest Every week for 8 weeks, I’ll be live presenting a new section of my re-vamped online course, for free, on the Lockdown Livestream! http://localhost:1313/blog/forest-garden-course-livestreamed-free-over-8-weeks/

item.title: Online forest garden design course, by RakeshB
item.description:
Rakesh B, who I met via the National Forest Gardening Scheme, is running an online forest garden design course, from 13 June to 19 July, on weekends

These are the details that Rakesh passed on to me, please do share 🙂💚🌳 http://localhost:1313/blog/rakesh-design-course/

item.title: Diversity
item.description:
Notes for those who want to take positive action to improve the diversity of people involved with forest gardens and horticulture

87% of the UK identify as White. In the UK horticulture industry, the figure is 99%*. http://localhost:1313/diversity/

item.title: Recording Online Course
item.description: I’m in the middle of writing the slideshow script for the forest garden online course, and I thought somebody might be interested in my recording setup, particularly if you’d like to create a course yourself. http://localhost:1313/blog/recording-online-course/
